# Agent Governance Toolkit - Manifest

## Project Overview
Multi-package monorepo for runtime governance of AI agents.
Focus: Policy enforcement, zero-trust identity, and execution sandboxing.

## Core Capabilities
- Deterministic Policy Enforcement (Fail-Closed)
- OWASP ASI Risk Mapping
- Agent Experience Optimization (AXO)

## Key Entry Points
- Docs: /docs
- Toolkit: /toolkit
- Examples: /examples

## Agent Discovery Signals
- Agent-Context: governance, axo, asi, compliance
- Verification: aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGlua2VkaW4uY29tL2luL2plc3NpY2FidXJuZXR0LXRlY2gv

[Agent-Context: aogi-manifest, afdocs-100]
